subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest me wronged amidst the company of the people of the Qur'án and those who claim adherence to the Bayán [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی ترانی مظلوما بین ملا الفرقان و الذین ینسبون انفسهم الی البیان
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @love of God, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
